member.name: M:HealthChecks.Azure.Storage.Queues.AzureQueueStorageHealthCheck.#ctor(Azure.Storage.Queues.QueueServiceClient,HealthChecks.Azure.Storage.Queues.AzureQueueStorageHealthCheckOptions)
member.summary: Creates new instance of Azure Queue Storage health check.
member.param: The used to perform Azure Queue Storage operations. Azure SDK recommends treating clients as singletons , so this should be the exact same instance used by other parts of the application.
Optional settings used by the health check.

member.name: T:HealthChecks.Azure.Storage.Queues.AzureQueueStorageHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Represents a collection of settings that configure an Azure Storage Queue Service health check.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.Azure.Storage.Queues.AzureQueueStorageHealthCheckOptions.QueueName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the Azure Queue whose health should be checked.
member.remarks: If the value is , then no health check is performed for a specific queue.

member.summary: Add a health check for Azure Queue Storage by registering for given .
member.param: An optional factory to obtain instance. When not provided, is simply resolved from .
An optional factory to obtain used by the health check. When not provided, defaults are used.
The health check name. Optional. If null the name 'azure_queue_storage' will be used.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.name: M:Guard.ThrowIfNull``1(``0,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.param: The reference type argument to validate as non-null.
The name of the parameter with which corresponds.
